fields.helpText: This field contains a patient's self-reported Registration reason.

fields.setOfCodes: 1:REGISTER A PATIENT;2:COLLATERAL OF PATIENT;3:RECORD CREATED BY HEC;4:VBA AUTO REGISTRATION;
fields.helpText: This field contains values that determine which records can be selected  for different processes.
This field contains a code for Registration reason.

identifiers.value: W:$D(^("0")) ?40,$P(^("0"),U,3) W:$P(^("0"),U,1)["VHA TRANSPLANT" !,"   (including organ and plasma donors)" W:$P(^("0"),U,1)["EXPOSURE" !,"   (including Agent Orange, CLV etc.)"
